title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security. A reset link will be sent to their registered email.

title: Refund Policy
content: Refunds are processed within 5 business days after approval.

title: Account Deletion
content: Users can permanently delete their account from Settings > Account > Delete.

title: Change Email
content: Users can change their email from Profile Settings.

title: Subscription Cancellation
content: Subscriptions can be cancelled anytime from the billing section.
